description_long: This house features a steeply pitched, dramatically curved gable roof with wooden shingles and a prominent stone chimney. The structure is primarily constructed from timber and stone, with exposed wooden beams and a rustic balcony on the upper floor. The front facade includes a covered porch, wooden steps, and several barrels and crates, suggesting a lived-in, rural character. Windows are asymmetrically placed, with wooden frames and decorative crossbars, adding to the cottage-like charm. The stone foundation and lower walls provide a sturdy base, while the upper story is clad in timber. The overall design evokes a whimsical, storybook or fantasy architectural style, blending practicality with decorative flair.
description: A whimsical, timber-and-stone house with a steeply curved gable roof, rustic balcony, and asymmetrical windows. The structure features a covered porch, stone foundation, and decorative wooden elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, wooden steps, barrels, and crates, as well as the prominent curved roof and balcony.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side of the house, the stone chimney, and the upper balcony with visible wooden railings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full expanse of the curved roof, stone foundation, and a wooden deck or walkway with minimal windows.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the balcony, side windows, and the interplay of stone and timber construction.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with wooden steps, rustic wooden door, and decorative barrels and crates
